import requests, base64
from Crypto.Cipher import PKCS1_v1_5
from Crypto.PublicKey import RSA

s = requests.Session\(\)
s.headers.update\({'Accept': '*/*', 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}\)

pk = s.get\('https://ams.gunsun.net/api/auth/config/PASSWORD_PUBLIC_KEY'\).json\(\)['data']
key = RSA.import_key\(base64.b64decode\(pk\)\)
enc_pwd = base64.b64encode\(PKCS1_v1_5.new\(key\).encrypt\(b'Aa123456'\)\).decode\(\)
r = s.post\('https://ams.gunsun.net/api/auth/authentication/login',
    json={'username': 'ahbozhenadmin', 'password': enc_pwd},
    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json;charset=utf-8'}\)

print\('ALL response headers:'\)
for k, v in r.headers.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)
")

Bash(/Users/I306969/Development/HFBZ/.venv/bin/python -c "
import requests, base64, json
from Crypto.Cipher import PKCS1_v1_5
from Crypto.PublicKey import RSA

s = requests.Session\(\)
s.headers.update\({'Accept': '*/*', 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}\)
pk = s.get\('https://ams.gunsun.net/api/auth/config/PASSWORD_PUBLIC_KEY'\).json\(\)['data']
enc_pwd = base64.b64encode\(PKCS1_v1_5.new\(RSA.import_key\(base64.b64decode\(pk\)\)\).encrypt\(b'Aa123456'\)\).decode\(\)
r = s.post\('https://ams.gunsun.net/api/auth/authentication/login', json={'username': 'ahbozhenadmin', 'password': enc_pwd}, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json;charset=utf-8'}\)
s.headers.update\({'Session-Id': r.headers['session-id']}\)
s.post\('https://ams.gunsun.net/api/auth/system/choose-system', json={'systemType': 'robin'}\)

r2 = s.get\('https://ams.gunsun.net/api/robin/asset-account', params={'current':1,'pageSize':5,'page':1}\)
data = r2.json\(\)
print\('keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\)
print\('data type:', type\(data.get\('data'\)\)\)
if isinstance\(data.get\('data'\), dict\):
    print\('data keys sample:', list\(data['data'].keys\(\)\)[:5]\)
    first = data['data'].get\('0'\) or data['data'].get\('records'\)
    if first:
        print\('first record keys:', list\(first.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(first, dict\) else list\(first[0].keys\(\)\)\)
print\(json.dumps\(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)[:2000]\)
")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/python3.10 -c "
import urllib3
urllib3.disable_warnings\(\)
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
from api import get_token, fetch_case_list
import os

token = get_token\(\)
print\(f'Token: {token[:30]}...'\)

result = fetch_case_list\(token, org_id=int\(os.getenv\('ORG_ID', 47\)\), page=1, size=10\)
print\(f'Code: {result[\\"code\\"]}'\)
records = result['data']['records']
print\(f'Records fetched: {len\(records\)}'\)
print\(f'Total: {result[\\"data\\"][\\"total\\"]}'\)
for r in records:
    print\(f'  {r[\\"caseNo\\"]} | {r[\\"userName\\"]} | {r[\\"caseStatusText\\"]} | {r[\\"handleAmount\\"]}'\)
")
